title: Expecting unknown properties to be ignored when creating a PROGRAMME EPISODE
gherkin:
When the user creates a "PROGRAMME EPISODE" "Polar Special" with the following data
  | key                   | value          |
  | title                 | The Falls Guys |
  | season_number         | 2              |
  | season_episode_number | 2              |
  | original_air_date     | 2017-12-08     |
  | duration              | PT55M          |
  | thimbleweed           | park           |
Then the response should contain the following properties
  | key                   | value          |
  | title                 | The Falls Guys |
  | season_number         | 2              |
  | season_episode_number | 2              |
  | original_air_date     | 2017-12-08     |
  | duration              | PT55M          |
And the response should NOT contain the following keys
  | key         |
  | thimbleweed |
